title: Billy the Kid and the Green Baize Vampire
original_title: Billy the Kid and the Green Baize Vampire
overview: Cocky cockney snooker player Billy Kid accepts the challenge of a grudge match from Maxwell Randall (the Green Baize Vampire), six times world champion; the loser will never play professional snooker again.
